textByHash.1cda5797332068419a279d4d52e1ee154532abf9: Escape!? It's all I ever think about!
textByHash.392f1c4c213c22487ecf0af1dac18775a8c713d3: Who's an ugly human? Give me a banana!
textByHash.3ff9fcd011d71177686489d237a24756b6de212f: Hey baldy, give monkey another banana!
textByHash.5009b7cc6bf72c51f0a1993a9a126522106a75ba: Ah Ah Ah! Ah Ah Ah!
textByHash.59708079437b7ac5e05c5a45a4efdf2a5b89ff77: Aghhh. You're a rubbish human, get monkey a banana now.
textByHash.629afbc355e6ded20446e6f6e8ef061fa0398cc7: Where will you be taking me?
textByHash.6584ba47c10ab315446485afe9c9baee4c7e0ac7: Arr! Yer messin with me monkey plunder!
textByHash.73e86c2e112a9b0222dcd2ea43960776a7a64cd5: I'm not hangin' around te be killed!
textByHash.79d16e2ac544a3d4c41673ad7df33fc728b6a9eb: Stupid human! Give monkey a banana!
textByHash.a33a3d1ed0c1bbee56646d49663ff54065da646d: Pretty please with a banana on top?
textByHash.ae1d26875085e7af90c3f75be82488dec42f7b99: I'm not goin' back in that brewery, not fer all the Bitternuts I can carry!
textByHash.b31e4f4a696e60c6eb598cf8a385fba55afbe4e0: Yes. Actually, can I bring some of my friends?
textByHash.d9b2e422350a29fe384b4f433424afe248aaf438: Monkey wants another banana now! Give me, give me!
textByHash.e433842304b8728488d7c6c16c9faa09a6102e0a: Ha ha! Smelly human gave monkey a banana.
textByHash.edd9f69c005e4f5a881b48477f2e3d0b358973e1: Ukkuk oook! Eeek aka, ahh aka gonk.
textByHash.f938a6e8125ed8bc803e6a85bca5082e3aaef6f1: Let me go, can't ye hear them? Howlin' in the dark...
textByHash.fa6b070cd14b75e0511d69bc44ab025677a80737: Wowee! I was born there you know!
textByHash.fabdaf83a35d6d81ba319e634bafb3270960bd40: No reason. Have a nice day.
